description: Delete the now-unnecessary machinery that treated macros like ordinary executable roots: macro-root bookkeeping, root/artifact special cases that only existed to carry defmacro toward runtime codegen, and stale tests/docs that imply macros belong in the final program. Signal: the remaining code reads like one model—defmacro is compile-time-only, BackendProgram is the interpreter handoff, and no macro path reaches native/codegen; docs and telemetry-based tests state that invariant explicitly.
title: Compiler2 macro cleanup: delete macro-root runtime scaffolding and restate the invariant
